description_long: This garlic bulb features several large, plump cloves tightly clustered together, each encased in a thin, papery skin that ranges from off-white to light tan with subtle pinkish hues. The cloves are distinct and bulbous, with their pointed tips converging toward the top, where a thick, pale stem remnant protrudes and curves slightly. The base of the bulb shows some rough, fibrous remnants of the root tuft, though it is not highly pronounced. The surface of the cloves is matte and slightly textured, with visible ridges and natural creases. The papery skin is partially peeled in some areas, revealing the smooth, firm flesh of the cloves beneath. Overall, the bulb appears fresh and robust, with a natural, organic form typical of garlic found in markets or urban gardens.
description: A robust garlic bulb with several large, tightly packed cloves, partially covered by papery skin and topped with a thick, curved stem remnant.
description_view_0: This view highlights the bulb's rounded shape, showing several prominent cloves and the thick, curved stem remnant extending from the top.
description_view_1: The cloves are more distinctly separated in this view, with the papery skin partially peeled and the stem remnant clearly visible.
description_view_2: This angle emphasizes the bulb's side, revealing the layered arrangement of the cloves and more exposed flesh where the skin is missing.
description_view_3: The view shows the underside and side of the bulb, with the base and some fibrous root remnants visible, as well as the stem remnant's attachment.
attribute_bulb_segmentation: The bulb is partially separated into individual cloves, with 6-8 distinct segments visible. The segmentation is clear, with each clove outlined by papery skin and natural creases.
attribute_clove_arrangement: The cloves are tightly packed in a roughly circular arrangement, radiating outward from the center and converging at the top beneath the stem remnant. The distribution is regular and symmetrical.
attribute_root_tuft_visibility: visible, small and fibrous with a light brown color and rough texture
attribute_stem_remnant: present, thick and pale, approximately 4-5 cm long, slightly curved and fibrous in appearance
